scripts.build:oracle: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir=path.join(__dirname,'src/data');fs.mkdirSync(dir,{recursive:true});const data={version:'1.0',timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),optimalExpectedScore:254.589,estimatedBySimulation:false,note:'Value from Yahtzee optimal play analysis'};fs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir,'oracle.json'),JSON.stringify(data,null,2));console.log('✓ Oracle generated')"
scripts.build: npm run build:oracle && tsc -b && vite build
